economic_mechanism: Quarterly earnings resolve concentrated information uncertainty; analyst and investor underreaction might cause the signed first completed post-announcement move to continue over the following five completed sessions relative to prior same-symbol non-event sessions with similar completed reaction, trend, and realized-volatility state.
candidate_or_family_scope: POST_EARNINGS_INFORMATION_RESOLUTION_DRIFT_CALL_DEBIT_21D_V1 / POST_EARNINGS_INFORMATION_RESOLUTION_DRIFT on frozen present-day liquid operating-company panel AAPL, AMD, SMCI, TSLA, META, GOOGL, ARM, NVDA; explicit retrospective BMO/AMC timestamps; absolute first completed-session reaction >=2%; prior same-symbol same-sign non-event controls; chronological 60/40 blueprint split; future conditional one-lot 21-DTE $2-wide call/put debit spread is structural context only with capital_fit_usd=200, max_loss_usd=200 before closing friction, max_lots=1.
falsifier: Close at F0 if the event source cannot supply explicit timestamp/session mapping for a non-vacuous sample; train has fewer than 40 matched pairs or 6 symbols; event signed mean does not exceed control; paired five-session signed excess mean or one-sided 90% five-pair circular-block-bootstrap lower bound is non-positive; continuation hit-rate edge is below 5 percentage points; or chronology, overlap, source-hash, population, strict-JSON, outcome-unread, or numeric integrity fails.

strategy_advancement.summary: The exact unconditional post-earnings signed-continuation family failed the absolute and matched-control train gates and remains at F0. The 51-blueprint holdout stayed outcome-unread; no option pricing, L1 claim, capital seat, registry, paper, shadow, arm, broker, or live authority opened.

search_information.summary: The wake closed a materially different issuer-event mechanism on 75 train pairs across seven symbols, retained a reusable timestamp-aware matched-control lab, repaired serialized matching-geometry and zero-support diagnostics after critique, and activated the three-post-advance-no-advance burst stop without changing phase or capital authority.

useful_deltas.summary: Closed POST_EARNINGS_INFORMATION_RESOLUTION_DRIFT at F0: train n=75 across seven symbols; event signed mean -0.483123%, control -0.184007%, paired mean -0.299116%, LB90 -1.615360%, hit-rate edge -1.333 percentage points, integrity violations empty, holdout 51 unread, and pricing calls zero.

Added a timestamp-aware earnings-event train lab with explicit BMO/AMC mapping, ambiguous-time stand-aside, persisted source hashes, prior-only same-symbol same-sign non-event controls, without-replacement/non-overlap integrity, chronological unread holdout, block-bootstrap gate, strict JSON, and Layered Edge Stack/capital-authority labels.

Reconciled challenger methodology nits by serializing per-pair calendar/covariate gaps plus max/median geometry and a diagnostic-only >=10% extreme-pair count, and by adding a zero-control-support negative control that fails before bootstrap with strict JSON nulls.

Recorded the third consecutive completed post-advance strategy wake without STRATEGY_ADVANCED, set strategy_burst_stop_required=true, and replaced experiment volume with one search-design reassessment seed.

critic_findings.finding: Train pair rows omitted serialized match distances/covariate gaps and the adverse-tail story lacked a formal extreme-pair diagnostic.
critic_findings.rationale: The current tracked claim carries per-pair geometry plus max/median calendar, reaction, ret20, and hv20 gaps and a diagnostic-only absolute 10% extreme-pair count. The real train has 15/75 such pairs; this is not a post-hoc gate and does not rescue the family because absolute event expectancy, paired mean, uncertainty bound, and hit edge all failed.

critic_findings.finding: The lab lacked an explicit zero-control-support negative control that fails before bootstrap with strict JSON missingness.
critic_findings.rationale: The empty-train path now has explicit null diagnostics and a regression forces zero matched support, verifies FAMILY_CLOSED before bootstrap metrics, and serializes with allow_nan=False.

critic_findings.finding: Current retrospective Yahoo earnings timestamps support pre-event scheduling or historical known-at calendar alpha.
critic_findings.rationale: They do not. The payload, regression, readiness, and final reports explicitly limit the source to post-announcement session alignment. Any future pre-event or fundamental-surprise mechanism needs honest point-in-time known-at provenance.

critic_findings.finding: A positive paired median, 53.3% positive-pair frequency, sparse SMCI slice, or symbol/threshold churn can salvage the exact family.
critic_findings.rationale: The frozen pooled event mean, paired mean, bootstrap lower bound, and hit-rate edge all failed; 15/75 diagnostic extreme pairs expose tail instability; no subset gate was predeclared; and the sealed holdout was not spent. Reopening requires a genuinely different economic mechanism and evidence class.

critic_findings.finding: The final readiness surface may retain the prior streak of two and the old post-earnings experiment NEXT.
critic_findings.rationale: The final readiness, LATEST, INDEX, learning, and compounding surfaces now record three consecutive completed post-advance no-advance wakes, burst_stop=true, and exactly one BURST_STOP_SEARCH_DESIGN_REASSESSMENT seed.

critic_findings.finding: This is the third consecutive completed epoch wake without STRATEGY_ADVANCED.
critic_findings.rationale: The active breakout epoch completed with F2 advancement at 1606. Living prose now uses the accurate phrase: third consecutive completed post-advance strategy wake without STRATEGY_ADVANCED (1648, 1747, 1829).

critic_findings.finding: The new lab, dependency, and tests alone constitute strategy advancement.
critic_findings.rationale: Capability is reported separately as search information. The only strategy outcome is FAMILY_CLOSED at F0; strategy_advancement.advanced remains false.

closed_families: POST_EARNINGS_INFORMATION_RESOLUTION_DRIFT: exact frozen AAPL/AMD/SMCI/TSLA/META/GOOGL/ARM/NVDA present-day panel, retrospective explicit BMO/AMC timestamps, >=2% first-completed-session reaction, prior same-symbol same-sign non-event controls, five-session signed continuation, chronological 60/40 specification
data_dependencies: A successor fundamental-surprise or estimate-revision interaction would require genuinely point-in-time announcement, estimate, and revision data with honest known-at provenance; current Yahoo retrospective timestamps cannot supply pre-event scheduling authority.

Observed historical option quotes, contract grids, implied-volatility paths, and complete entry/exit joins remain necessary before any later debit-spread expression could claim L1 calibration; they are not needed to preserve this F0 family close.
next: BURST_STOP_SEARCH_DESIGN_REASSESSMENT: stop strategy-experiment volume. Diagnose the 1648 breakout-expression dual-cost/path close, 1747 post-shock compression close, and 1829 post-earnings continuation close; test whether current matched-control discovery is surfacing positive-median/adverse-tail families unsuitable for one-lot defined-risk income; inventory independent non-quarantined evidence classes; then open at most one successor epoch/charter with a complete Layered Edge Stack and predeclared falsifier before another strategy experiment. Do not rerun or threshold/panel-churn the closed post-earnings, post-shock, breakout-expression, TOM, OPEX, or monthly-ranking families. No registry, paper force, shadow, arm, broker, or live action.
